data.title: Pre Brands reveals new packaging design highlighting protein, enhancing "Beef Done Differently" experience. - CHICAGO, Jan. 27, 2026
data.description: Pre® Brands, a prominent provider of grass-fed and grass-finished premium lean beef proteins in the United States, has introduced a new design focused on highlighting protein in a clear and modern way. The company, based in Chicago, unveiled the updated look on January 27, 2026. This initiative aims to bring "Beef Done Differently" to life, emphasizing the protein aspect of their products.

data.title: Cliffwater's private equity fund hits $5 billion AUM, leading in performance and fundraising among 1940 Act PE funds.
data.description: On January 27, 2026, Cliffwater, a prominent manager of private markets interval funds, unveiled that their Cascade Private Capital Fund ("CPEFX") has achieved a milestone of $5 billion in net assets. This fund currently stands out as the top performer among 1940 Act private equity funds1, excelling in both performance and fundraising.

data.title: UPS plans to cut up to 30,000 jobs in 2026 due to reduced package deliveries for Amazon, its unprofitable customer.
data.description: The delivery company has announced its intention to implement budget reductions within the current year due to a projected decline in the volume of packages being delivered for Amazon. Amazon, a notable but financially inefficient client, is anticipated to account for a reduced number of deliveries, prompting the delivery company to make cost-saving adjustments.

data.title: Paddletek introduces new 'Reserve Honeyfoam™' paddle, marking milestone in paddle engineering. Chicago, Jan. 27, 2026.
data.description: Today, Paddletek Group unveiled a groundbreaking achievement in paddle engineering by introducing the limited-edition Reserve Honeyfoam™ paddle on Jan. 27, 2026, in Chicago. This release coincides with the expansion of their sponsored athlete roster and recognition for three Paddletek leaders. The new paddle release marks a significant milestone for the company as they continue to push the boundaries of paddle technology.

data.title: Kalshi increases political presence by opening DC office and hiring Democrat for state policy and federal relations - 2 new team members.
data.description: The platform for predictions market disclosed the addition of two new employees focusing on state policy initiatives and federal government relations.

data.title: Collaboration between SkySlope and OneKey® benefits 43,000 REALTORS® in New York Metro, offering faster, smarter forms.
data.description: In Sacramento, California on January 27, 2026, OneKey® MLS, a leading multiple listing service in the U.S., revealed a significant development for its members. They introduced SkySlope Forms, a top-tier digital forms solution that has been integrated into their system. This move aims to empower their members and enhance their efficiency.

data.title: 2026 Ultimate Ice Cream Fan contest offers $3,000 prize from Hudsonville Ice Cream in Holland, MI, featuring new Birthday Cake flavor.
data.description: Earn money by indulging in ice cream throughout the entire year, featuring the debut of the exclusive Birthday Cake flavor from the established 100-year-old company located in Holland, Michigan. The news was announced on January 27, 2026, by Hudsonville Ice Cream. Show off your ice cream expertise and get ready for a delicious year ahead with Hudsonville’s exciting offerings.

data.title: Armor warns organizations without AI security policies are behind, releases governance framework. Protects 1,700+ orgs across 40.
data.description: Armor has introduced an AI governance framework to fill a notable policy void amid the rapid growth in enterprise AI adoption. The company, renowned for its cloud-native managed detection and response solutions, safeguards over 1,700 entities spanning 40 industries. The new framework aims to enhance accountability and oversight in AI applications, catering to the evolving needs of businesses relying on AI technologies.

data.title: InventHelp client creates a new towel for fitness buffs to block germs and sweat; aims to offer better hygiene.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, two inventors introduced a new towel product designed to offer a protective barrier against germs, sweat, and bacteria on exercise machine benches and seats. This innovative product aims to enhance hygiene and user comfort during workouts.

data.title: Julayne Lazar from Rubin Rudman joins Boston Cares Board of Directors, biggest volunteer agency in New England.
data.description: Boston, MA - Rubin Rudman has recently revealed that Julayne Lazar, a partner in the firm's Labor and Employment and Higher Education divisions, has been appointed to the Board of Directors of Boston Cares. Boston Cares is the predominant volunteer agency in New England, aiding 150 regions. This news was disclosed on January 27, 2026.

data.title: Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas allocates millions in 2026 for community investments, $17 million for first-time homebuyer aid.
data.description: In Dallas, the Federal Home Loan Bank of Dallas (FHLB Dallas) has announced a significant commitment through its 2026 Community Investment programs to enhance housing and economic development in its five-state District. This initiative includes millions in funding, with $17 million specifically allocated for first-time homebuyer assistance. Greg Hettrick, senior vice president of FHLB Dallas, emphasized the organization's focus on providing members with adaptable financial resources and grants to bolster housing initiatives and promote economic growth within the communities they support.

data.title: USDCx now available on Aleo as privacy blockchains incorporate stablecoin support for growing crypto market demand.
data.description: The cooperation highlights how networks focusing on privacy are adjusting to an economy in which stablecoins hold a dominant position in the crypto market.

data.title: AI fraud is rising, with 71% of U.S. companies facing more attacks; 48% still use manual checks.
data.description: In New York, a recent study by Trustpair shows that AI-powered fraud is surpassing human defenses at a concerning pace. The data indicates that 71% of American companies have witnessed a surge in attacks in the past year. Despite this, 48% of these organizations are still dependent on manual checks to thwart such fraudulent activities. The study, titled Fraud in the Cyber Era: 2026 Fraud Trends & Insights, was conducted in collaboration with corporate practitioners and Kinexys experts at J.P. Morgan. A total of 250 CFOs and senior finance executives from U.S. enterprises participated in the survey, revealing a significant vulnerability in their defense mechanisms.

data.title: WellSky launches AI-powered referral management workflows to automate intake for home health and hospice providers.
data.description: In Overland Park, Kansas, WellSky has introduced AI-driven referral management processes to assist home health and hospice providers in consolidating intake procedures and handling referrals efficiently.

data.title: Inventor from New Port Richey, Fla. creates MY COACH WEIGHTS, smart hand weights with fitness data; aims to motivate workout.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on January 27, 2026, a creator from New Port Richey, Florida, shared their inspiration for inventing the MY COACH WEIGHTS - smart hand weights aimed at amplifying workouts. These innovative weights are designed to track fitness data and deliver encouraging coaching messages to users during their exercises.

data.title: Jefferson Health collaborates with Qualified Health to deepen AI capabilities, improving patient and clinician value.
data.description: Jefferson Health and Qualified Health revealed a progressive collaboration in PALO ALTO, Calif., on Jan. 27, 2026. This partnership aims to enhance governance structures, boost innovation capacity, and deliver more value to patients and clinicians. Building upon Jefferson's robust AI base, the initiative opens up new opportunities for advancement in healthcare services.
